title: Monday.com >< Xero
excerpt:
Our team had a great time at the recent Hackathon, and would now love to see users using and start receiving user feedback on our Xero monday.com App. 
If you are interested in connecting your boards to Xero, we’d love t…

posts.author: Jack-JTsCloud (Jack Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team had a great time at the recent Hackathon, and would now love to see users using and start receiving user feedback on our Xero monday.com App.

If you are interested in connecting your boards to Xero, we’d love to hear from them to get them on the early adopters. Please complete this form:

forms.monday.com

monday.com Xero Intergration Enquiry Form | monday.com forms

From requests, feedback to data collection and more. Turn your insights into action with customizable WorkForms.

At this stage, we have 4 recipes, which connect users to timesheet in Xero, fixed-rate invoicing, time-based invoicing and contact creation.

What should we build next?

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s fantastic news. Now I am starting to see the potential of the Monday apps platform.

What we would like to achieve with the Xero to Monday integration is a connected view of our cashflow. If we could have a Monday board that outlined our confirmed upcoming future revenue that knew when that had been paid into Xero, we could have a good cashflow forecast.

No idea what that would require in terms of integrations though!!

posts.author: Jack-JTsCloud (Jack Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
G’day @TheOtherPM! I like the sound of that too!!

Achievable @mitchell.hudson and @vcdizon04?

I agree on Paul, apps are super exciting, this is just the beginning!

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TheOtherPM,

I definitely think that this would be possible!

We can collect all this information using the Xero API and load it into monday.com using their API.

We can even make this almost ‘Live’ as we can receive an update from Xero when an invoice is added/paid so it accurately reflects in monday.com!

It would be great to jump on a quick call to discuss your requirements and get this in production for you! Would you mind booking in a time on my calendar here → https://hello.jtscloud.com/meetings/mitchellhudson/mondaycom-apps-exploration

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome, I’ve booked a time in for this Friday. That’s exciting.

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml: @TheOtherPM Awesome! I look forward to chatting with you!

posts.author: snicho (Stephen Nicholson)
posts.cookedHtml: How did you go with this? We have clients who are using Xero and I’m sure that could leverage this integration. What would we need to be able trial this?

posts.author: Jack-JTsCloud (Jack Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @snicho thanks for the message.

You can express interest here monday.com Xero Intergration Enquiry Form

We are sending the trial live this week! Look forward to learning the use case with you.

CC: @mitchell.hudson

posts.author: Robinzrb (Robin)
posts.cookedHtml: I have fill the form, just wondering is there any update?

posts.author: Jack-JTsCloud (Jack Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Robinzrb

Welcome to the monday.com Community!

Can see we’ve received your form, and the team will get in contact on Monday to get you activated.

Have a great rest of your weekend.

CC: @mitchell.hudson

posts.author: Robinzrb (Robin)
posts.cookedHtml: Please sync invoice payment status, contacts

posts.author: bevoid (Ric)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you support the ability to create an item in monday.com when a new invoice is created (with custom fields e.g. Xero URL, etc.)?

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
@bevoid Hi there!

We don’t at this stage.

However we will be! We are just waiting on a feature to be released by monday to allow column mapping. It should be released shortly.

If you complete this expression form - monday.com Xero Intergration Enquiry Form we will notify you when this feature becomes available

posts.author: lyn (Lynette)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

Apologies if this is not the right spot to put my question.

We are currently investigating which is the best CRM for our organisation and it is crucial for us to be able to integrate with xero.
Not sure about what you’ve released but main parts of integration are:

  1. being able to create contacts in xero from Monday
  2. Being able to update Monday if a quote is created in xero and accepted, and invoiced

Have yet to sign up for a trial

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @lyn,

Welcome to the community!

I am happy to answer your question here.

Currently, our Xero app is able to create contacts (along with invoices and timesheets).

We will be releasing the ability to sync invoices, quotes and contacts FROM Xero shortly. We are just waiting on a feature release from the monday team we should be very close

I am happy for your to book in a time here to show you the app.

posts.author: lyn (Lynette)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mitchell,

That sounds good. just to clarify:

  1. the contacts creation is this able to be done FROM monday.com → Xero?
  2. will your demo show me the new feature release?
  3. do you think i need to organise a demo for monday.com first so i can understand how the apps/integrations work?

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
@lyn

1 - Yes, we can create a contact in Xero based on monday.com
2 - No it won’t sorry, as we haven’t begun the development as the feature we require
3 - I can arrange for our sales team to run you through a demo of monday.com as well if you like? Feel free to book a time here as it will allow a little more time for the demo on monday.com as well here

posts.author: lyn (Lynette)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ah, i just reread your other post, so it can create invoices and timesheets (in Xero I assume?)
but just can’t sync back to Monday.com

Great i’ll book in some times once I check with my colleague who wil be assisting me in this.

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
What an exciting integration!

We are looking to get the invoice PDF link from Monday to xero and payment status.

posts.author: DF2019 (David Fischer)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love a way to connect and auto-generated invoice that is paid with an Item in monday. So that when an invoice is paid, the corresponding project in monday is marked paid and can be archived.

posts.author: Eda6195 (Emily Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to know when this is possible.

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ElenaK, sorry I missed your message.

Are you looking to send the PDF link from Xero to a monday.com item do you mean? This should be possible in our next update!

Happy to jump on a call to demonstrate - [https://hello.jtscloud.com/meetings/mitchellhudson/app-demo](http://App Demo)

Or you can complete this form to install/test and keep up to date with future releases - [monday.com Xero Intergration Enquiry Form](http://Enquiry Form)

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DF2019

Sorry for the delay response.

We are currently working on this feature as we speak, we are hoping to get the sync up and running within the next few weeks

posts.author: DF2019 (David Fischer)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s good news, thank you. One comment on pricing though. The original fee you had mentioned, I thought was too high, for what the features did…just some feedback, so you can get as many customers as possible.

posts.author: Jack-JTsCloud (Jack Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for your feedback, David (@DF2019). We appreciate it.

Would be great to hear your feedback on how you would price the app? Particularly whether you’d paid per recipe or for all recipes, annual vs. monthly or any further detailed feedback would be valued.

We want to also have as many customers as possible

posts.author: DF2019 (David Fischer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jack,
Pricing should be based on number of recipes or features. A client that uses only 1 recipe should pay a lower amount than someone who uses more recipes. I don’t recall the exact figure you had quoted, but it was $50-$60, and based on what we see with other online services that have a very narrow focus (appointment scheduling, etc.) the fees are $9, $15, $19 etc. and certainly not more than that. Also in your case, you will likely want to get traction and as a new service, you want to get more customers on board quickly to create momentum. Also a higher price-point with a brand new service (unknown and untested) will also be a deterrent to sign up new customers.
Hope this helps.

posts.author: Jack-JTsCloud (Jack Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Big help, thanks, David! Appreciate your time.

posts.author: Saskia (Saskia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am currently searching for the right CRM and project management tool for our business. However as we are already using Xero, it will require integration with this.

How do I get this integration app while I am still on the free trial for Monday? I don’t want to commit until I know it all works well together.

Thanks for any assistance

posts.author: Jack-JTsCloud (Jack Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Welcome to the monday.com community @Saskia!

With our app you have a 21 day trial period, go ahead a sign up here for your trial access:

forms.monday.com

monday.com Xero Intergration Enquiry Form | monday.com forms

From requests, feedback to data collection and more. Turn your insights into action with customizable WorkForms.

Let us know if you need further assistance.

Best,
Jack

posts.author: Alex-Velinov (Alex Velinov)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have one question for integrating Monday and Xero.

Here is a brief description on my case: We use a few google forms for our clients to brief new projects. So manage to link this in different boards in Monday. Once we have new brief its checked and approved, which means that this automatically move this to a new board based on status change.

Is it possible to automatically create invoice draft in Xero once project approved?

Many thanks

posts.author: Jack-JTsCloud (Jack Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Alex-Velinov

Welcome to the monday.com community!

Yes, this is achievable!

https://support.luxie.tech/support/solutions/articles/26000044057-recipe-create-invoice

Let me know if you have any further questions.

Best,
Jack

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
JT’s Cloud is pleased to announce our monday.com <> Xero Integration is now available on the monday.com Marketplace!

Check it out today here - https://monday.com/marketplace/95

Create Invoices, Track Timesheets and Sync Contacts between monday.com and Xero.

posts.author: SarahJacobs (Sarah Jacobs)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! I totally want to build a cash flow board in Monday that pulls info in real time from Xero

posts.author: Tara-Horn (Tara Horn)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Jack-JTsCloud Does this app connect to Xero practice manager?

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tara-Horn

No, this doesn’t integrate with XPM.

We found that the use cases varied too much to build a ‘common’ integration with XPM.

If you would like, I am happy to put you in touch with our team and we can scope out a custom integration with XPM for you?

posts.author: Tara-Horn (Tara Horn)
posts.cookedHtml: Sure, that would be great, happy to speak to them

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Tara-Horn great!

You can book in a call with our team using this link

Looking forward to connecting with you

posts.author: MichaelTomar (Michael Tomar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community!

I was also looking for a solution to this issue
You can use different third party tools to integrate Xero with Monday, for example Skyvia support this connection

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: exclude_reply_from_sla

posts.author: Tawanda (Tawanda)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking to create a dashboard in Monday that leverages on pulling some key metrics from xero reports i.e. payables, receivables, cash movements etc. what is the best practice here to do the integration

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Tawanda and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

What are you referring to specifically? Best practices about what part of the app exactly?

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tawanda

You can sync the Xero records to a monday.com board, i.e sync invoices, and bills and then create a dashboard in monday using these boards

You can check out the app here to begin syncing your data - Luxie Tech for Xero - monday.com App Marketplace

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: exclude_reply_from_sla
